response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title "Connect the World" from on-screen text during the music segment.
2. Identified performers as Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope from visual identification and Hololive English association.
3. Search query: "Connect the World" Hololive English lyrics.
4. Extracted lyrics in English. Since the song is primarily in English, reference_lyrics_og and reference_lyrics_en are the same.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance segment of Hololive English's original song "Connect the World" by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope. The video starts with a title card and transition sequence, followed by the performance.

scenes.description: Performance of the song "Connect the World" by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope. The song title and artist information are displayed on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro: All] 
We're ready to greet the world, we're voyaging forward 
With courage to run toward a brand new start 
Let's go live, bridging the distance across the sea endlessly 
Cheerfully meeting heart to heart. 

[Verse 1] 
Waking from a dream, swept up into a stream 
I make a wish and wait for my cue 
How will we connect in this new frontier we're journeying through? 
That's right! 

[Pre-Chorus] 
Creating a new place where we can shine 
Let's go live! 
Follow me and we'll turn the page! 
We can conquer any challenge with a smile 
Let's go! 
Making them reality, all fulfilled in the world we build! 

[Chorus] 
It's a timeless story with a new feel 
Not just allegory, it's real 
Wake up, big dreams about to come true 
That means it's time to break through 
Never knew we could make it so far, but we're 
Striving, thriving, here we are 
Achieving the impossible, we're virtually unstoppable 
We can't sit still, we just keep moving 
Now everybody sing! 

[Outro] 
They'll hear our song ringing out over hills and oceans 
Our legend grows and continues 
We'll carry on starting now, setting hearts in motion
